questionHtml: Identify if aqueous solutions of the following salts are acidic, basic, or neutral.
markschemeHtml:
Sodium methanoate: basic

Ammonium chloride: acidic

Sodium nitrate: neutral ✓ ✓


Award [2] for three correct.

Award [1] for two correct.

meta.title: Identify if aqueous solutions of the following salts are acidic, basic, or neutral.
